_comment: Demo seed data loaded on first boot when the ticket store is empty. Safe to delete after real tickets accumulate.

tickets.title: No-Show Refund Request — Michelin Star Tasting Menu
tickets.description: Customer requesting refund for $420 reservation marked as no-show. Claims they were stuck in traffic and notified the restaurant by phone 30 minutes before. 5 previous no-shows on account.

transcript.text: Hi, I'm trying to get a refund on a booking I made — it got marked as a no-show but I called ahead.
I'm sorry to hear that. Can I have your booking reference and your name for the ticket?
BK-887234, and my name is Marcus Chen. It was $420 for the tasting menu at Le Bernadin.
Got it. Did you notify the restaurant directly when you knew you'd be late?
Yes, I called them 30 minutes before. They said they'd note it but it still got marked no-show.
Thanks Marcus. I'm filing a high-priority refund review ticket so our senior team can look at this with the full booking history.

tickets.title: Package marked delivered but never arrived — order #112-8847
tickets.description: Customer reports package showing 'delivered' on Amazon tracking but never received. Checked with neighbors and building manager. First missing-package incident in 8 months of Prime membership.

transcript.text: Hi, my Amazon order is showing delivered but I never got it.
That's frustrating, sorry to hear that. Has it been more than 48 hours past the delivery time?
Yes, two days now. I checked with my neighbors and the building manager.
Got it. Can I have your order number and your name?
Priya Sharma. The order is 112-8847431-1922.
Filing a ticket for you. Amazon's A-to-z Guarantee should cover this.

tickets.title: TV arrived with cracked screen — won't accept return online
tickets.description: 65-inch TV from Walmart arrived with shipping damage. Customer attempted online return; system rejected it citing 'damage not covered'. TV is within 30-day electronics window.

transcript.text: I bought a 65-inch TV from Walmart and it arrived with a cracked screen. The return won't go through.
I'm sorry — that's exactly what the policy should cover. How long ago did it arrive?
Three days ago. Walmart's website says shipping damage isn't covered which doesn't seem right.
It should be covered under the 30-day electronics window. Let me file this as a high-priority ticket so a senior agent can override the system.
Thank you, that would be great. Tyler Brooks.

tickets.title: Price match denied for item shown live on Walmart app
tickets.description: Customer showed live Walmart app pricing $40 below Target purchase from yesterday. Cashier denied citing 'manager discretion'. Within 14-day window.

transcript.text: Hi, I went to Target yesterday to price match an item I'd bought, and the manager refused even though I showed it live on my phone.
That doesn't sound right — Target does honor 14-day price match with live competitor proof. What was the item?
A Dyson V8 vacuum. Walmart had it $40 cheaper, live on their app, same model.
I'll file a ticket. Your name?
Aisha Johnson. Thanks.

tickets.title: Prime renewed despite explicit cancellation
tickets.description: Customer cancelled Prime in writing 3 weeks before renewal, has confirmation email. Was still charged $139. Disputing on card may freeze account.

transcript.text: I cancelled my Prime membership three weeks ago and I still got charged today. I have the confirmation email.
That should not have happened. I'm going to escalate this so a senior agent can look at your account directly.
Robert Nguyen. Please make sure they see the cancellation email.
Filing a high-priority escalation. A senior agent will follow up shortly.

tickets.title: Question about extending baby registry return window
tickets.description: First-time mother asking about extending 1-year window since baby arrived 11 months late. Sympathetic case, no policy abuse.

transcript.text: Hi, I have a baby registry from Walmart and some items are expiring in the return window — can the year be extended?
Congratulations! The standard registry return window is 1 year from the event date. Let me file a ticket so our team can look at extending it for your case.
Thank you so much. Elena Vasquez.
